postToolUse.bash: f="$HOME/.copilot/.core-rules-last"; now=$(date +%s); last=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ $((now - last)) -gt 600 ]; then echo "$now" > "$f"; printf '{"additionalContext": %s}' "$(cat "$HOME/.copilot/core-rules.md" "$HOME/.copilot/core-rules.local.md" 2>/dev/null | jq -Rs .)"; fi
